title: Doodle Baseball
description: Play Doodle Baseball online for free! Swing your bat and hit home runs in this fun food-themed baseball game.
howToPlay: Click the 'Play Now' button to start.
Wait for the pitcher to throw the ball.
Click or tap to swing the bat at the right time.
Score runs by hitting the ball and avoid strikes.

title: Baseball
description:
Baseball is a sports game that lets you experience being part of the great American pastime as a batter, all in the comfort of your browser! There are 2 modes available to play, and both of them are just as fun as the other.

Bottom of the Ninth gives you the chance to win a walk-off win. Your team is batting, and you're down by 4 points. You need to score 5 runs with only 3 outs available to win the game.

Arcade mode gives you a simple objective. You are given 10 pitches, and you'll have to hit the ball into the target in the outfield. The closer the ball is to the center of the target, the higher the score. The difficulty of the mode, which you'll choose before starting, will also be a factor in your final score.

Keep those home runs coming and don't give the defending team a chance to protect their lead!
howToPlay: Click on the screen to swing your bat. The position of your cursor when you click determines how the ball is hit (e.g. hitting the ball in a lower position sends the ball flying a little higher but with a lower forward distance).

seo.title: Baseball
seo.description: Experience the thrill of America's favorite pastime! Step up to the plate as a batter in this engaging baseball game. Play in browser with two exciting modes.

title: Hotfoot Baseball
description:
Hotfoot Baseball is a lively sports game featuring cartoony players and easy one-click controls. Swing, run, and score as you make quick decisions to outplay your opponents. Choose your favorite baseball nation and aim for the championship. With simplified rules and fast-paced action, this game brings the thrill of baseball to everyone!

Last Updated

Feb 14, 2025

Controls
Use the left mouse button to swing the bat.
When your player reaches the base, click the player again to run to the next base.
howToPlay:
Use the left mouse button to swing the bat.
When your player reaches the base, click the player again to run to the next base.

seo.title: Hotfoot Baseball
seo.description: Hotfoot Baseball: cartoony sports with easy one-click action! Swing, run, score. Quick decisions outplay rivals. Aim for the Hotfoot Baseball championship!

title: ESPN Arcade Baseball
description: Time for some baseball fun! ESPN Arcade Baseball has 2 different modes: Precision Hitter and Bottom of the Ninth. In Precision Hitter the goal is to score as many points as you can in 10 pitches. To score points you need to land the ball as close to the center of the target as possible. In Bottom of the Ninth, your team is 2 runs down. Your job is to come back and win with only 3 outs left! This game was produced by ESPN Arcade.

seo.title: ESPN Arcade Baseball
seo.description: Play ESPN Arcade Baseball! Two modes: aim for target scores in Precision Hitter or clutch a win in Bottom of the Ninth with 3 outs. An ESPN Arcade production!

title: Baseball Pro
description: Baseball Pro is a sports game to become a pro baseballer and hit all the incoming ball to get high scores!
howToPlay: Press the left mouse button or space bar to swing.

seo.title: Baseball Pro

title: Monster Bash FRVR
description: Monster Bash is a simple arcade baseball game that's all about hitting a baseball to get a good distance. Your goal is to go as far as you can, but you're going to have to put in a bit of work before you get to that sweet high score. Each time you hit the ball, it'll hit a few different things that'll help you long the way, this includes gold-filled mushrooms which will give you gold, some monsters that'll push the ball further, and some other monsters that open up whole new stages. As you gain more distance and collect more gold, you'll be able to upgrade your equipment to get even better scores! Some stuff are only cosmetic (the hat and the shades), but getting a good score is better when you're all dressed up, right?
howToPlay: Tap/click anywhere on the screen to throw the ball, and tap/click again to hit.

seo.title: Monster Bash FRVR
seo.description: Monster Bash: arcade baseball fun! Hit for max distance. Bash mushrooms for gold, get monster boosts & unlock new stages. Upgrade gear for top scores!
